title.emphasis: A Unified Framework for Analyzing a Cooperative Security

section.para: Preamble: This document provides a formal, unified framework for analyzing any proposed cooperative security, including tokenized versions. It synthesizes the key legal and operational tests discussed—tradability, consumption, federal securities law, California's "risk capital" standard, and the pillars of Subchapter T—into a comprehensive 9-point analytical checklist. This framework can be used to classify any instrument, assess its legal risks, and determine its viability as a "safe" cooperative security.
